title: Teek (disambiguation)
content:
'''Teek''' may refer to one of the following:

*[[Teek (Teek)|Teek]], a companion of [[Noa Briqualon]]
*[[Teek (Neimoidian)]], a member of the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire's]] [[Imperial Science Bureau (Sith Empire)|Science Bureau]]
*[[Teek (species)/Legends|Teek (species)]], ape-like beings of the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]
*[[Teek language/Legends|Teek language]], the native tongue of the [[Teek (species)/Legends|Teek]] species
*[[Teek (Zygerrian)]], a [[Zygerrian/Legends|Zygerrian]] slaver

{{Disambig}}
